entry.title: New IDC 36C10B18D5000 awarded to CERNER GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS CONTRACT, THE ELECTRONIC HEALTH RECORD MODERNIZATION (EHRM), IS A SINGLE AWARD INDEFINITE-DELIVERY INDEFINITE-QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT FOR THE PROCUREMENT OF A SINGLE COMMON EHR ACROSS VA AND DOD. THIS ACQUISITION, AT A MINIMUM, SHALL INCLUDE THE FULL SCOPE OF SERVICES AND PRODUCTS NECESSARY TO DEPLOY THE DOD EHR SOLUTION IN A MANNER THAT MEETS THE NEEDS OF VA.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- INTEGRATED HARDWARE/SOFTWARE/SERVICES SOLUTIONS, PREDOMINANTLY SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 36C10B18D5000 (P00001) awarded to CERNER GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
MODIFICATION P00001 IS TO REVISE THE PERSONNEL SECURITY LANGUAGE IN THE PWS.
THIS CONTRACT, THE ELECTRONIC HEALTH RECORD MODERNIZATION (EHRM), IS A SINGLE AWARD INDEFINITE-DELIVERY INDEFINITE-QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT FOR THE PROCUREMENT OF A SINGLE COMMON EHR ACROSS VA AND DOD. THIS ACQUISITION, AT A MINIMUM, SHALL INCLUDE THE FULL SCOPE OF SERVICES AND PRODUCTS NECESSARY TO DEPLOY THE DOD EHR SOLUTION IN A MANNER THAT MEETS THE NEEDS OF VA.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- INTEGRATED HARDWARE/SOFTWARE/SERVICES SOLUTIONS, PREDOMINANTLY SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 36C10B18D5000 (P00002) awarded to CERNER GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: EXERCISE OPTIONAL ORDERING PERIOD 1 AND MAKE OTHER CHANGES TO THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
